summary: Iteration 108 testing completed. All requested features verified: 1) Background auto-generation of timeline events and case summary from documents - case_e7a5b5faf51e has 8 timeline events with source='ai_generated' and summary field populated. 2) Investigate endpoint for grounds of merit works - returns deep_analysis with full_analysis, investigated_at, law_sections_identified, similar_cases_found. 3) Print and PDF View buttons appear in ground detail dialog (data-testid='ground-print-btn' and 'ground-pdf-btn'). 4) Dashboard new case form defaults offence_category to 'Auto-detect from documents'. 5) Admin user (REDACTED_EMAIL) sees all grounds - paywall bypassed for admin.
seed_data_creation: N/A - used existing test case case_e7a5b5faf51e (R v Karlsson)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified: 1) Background auto-generation triggered by document upload at server.py line 944-946, generates timeline events with source='ai_generated' and case summary. 2) Investigate endpoint at /api/cases/{case_id}/grounds/{ground_id}/investigate returns deep_analysis object. 3) Print/PDF buttons in GroundsOfMerit.jsx dialog header at lines 588-593 with data-testid='ground-print-btn' and 'ground-pdf-btn'. 4) Dashboard new case form defaults offence_category to '' (Auto-detect). Admin user bypasses paywall and sees all grounds.
